de.uka.ilkd.key.gui

Class MainWindow.GlassPaneListener

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.event.MouseAdapter
      • javax.swing.event.MouseInputAdapter
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.MainWindow.GlassPaneListener
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    MouseListener, MouseMotionListener, MouseWheelListener, EventListener, MouseInputListener
    Enclosing class:
    MainWindow

    private static class MainWindow.GlassPaneListener
extends MouseInputAdapter
    Mouse listener for the glass pane that only delivers events for the status line (i.e. the abort button) This has been partly taken from the GlassPaneDemo of the Java Tutorial
